title: Follow the Sparkles
subtitle: Notice tiny sparkles of calm around you.

steps.text: Look around the room slowly, like you're searching for sparkles.
steps.hint: Move your eyes, not your whole head.

steps.text: Pick one tiny thing to focus on — a color, a shape, or a shadow.
steps.hint: Hold your attention there for one slow breath.

steps.text: Now choose a new sparkle — something small you didn’t notice before.
steps.hint: Let your breath stay soft and gentle.

steps.text: Find one last sparkle and take a deep breath in… and out.
